items.name: Reseller accounts
items.tactic: Each reseller: unique brand, discount tier (5%/10%/20%), inventory allocation, payout method.

items.name: Tiered pricing
items.tactic: 1-10 units full. 11-50: 10% off. 51+: 20% off. Auto-apply for resellers.

items.name: Reseller portal
items.tactic: See inventory, download catalog (white-labeled), track sales/commissions, request payout.

items.name: Automated payout
items.tactic: Weekly calc. Pay bank/PayPal. Auto-deduct returns/chargebacks.

items.name: Brand protection
items.tactic: Resellers can't modify pricing <20%. Territory restrictions. Track unauthorized.
